strengths: ~20 years of continuous software experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably clears the 15-year minimum
Current role at re:cinq includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP (Model Context Protocol) framework work, showing recent engagement with agentic AI tooling
Founded and maintains GISCollective, demonstrating entrepreneurial initiative, open-source community building, and sustained product ownership
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field; holds only a BS in Computer Science and a BA in Fine Arts, falling short of the preferred Master's/PhD profile
Meaningful AI experience begins only in April 2025 — there is no track record of recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products, or strategic AI advisory work prior to the current role

Career trajectory is that of a senior/staff individual contributor and craftsman, with no evidence of director-level IC scope, customer-facing strategic advisory, or cross-organizational technical leadership
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine technical depth and a long, varied engineering career, but the role demands a candidate who is already a recognized authority in AI — someone who has built and shipped AI-powered platforms, advises strategic customers, and operates at a director-level strategic scope. His AI work is nascent (less than two months at time of application), his educational background does not include the preferred AI-focused advanced degree, and his experience, while broad, has been consistently at the senior/staff practitioner level rather than at the technical strategy and organizational influence level this position requires.
